             Longmont City Council Meeting Rescheduled for July 1 
             
                 Published: 2026-06-30T15:51:04.985759100+00:00 
                 Format:  brief  
             
            
             
                 Longmont City Council will meet July 1 at 7 p.m. after the previously scheduled June 30 meeting was canceled. Residents who planned to attend or comment should check the city agenda page for the latest meeting details before going to City Hall.

             Longmont Youth Center Lists Summer Programs 
             
                 Published: 2026-06-30T15:52:26.219346+00:00 
                 Format:  brief  
             
            
             
                 Longmont Youth Center has summer programs on its calendar, including Navigators, Glam Group and Make it Better. Families should check the Youth Center listing before attending because the scan did not provide program fees, registration details or full descriptions.
